title: Argonyte
description: A clean, customizable FPS display that helps you monitor performance in style.
body: # A clean, customizable FPS display that helps you monitor performance in style ## Features **Color-coded FPS values:** 🔵 **Blue (90+ FPS)** = Excellent 🟢 **Green (60-89 FPS)** = Smooth 🟡 **Yellow (30-59 FPS)** = Playable 🔴 **Red (<30 FPS)** = Needs optimization **Clean design:** - `"FPS:"` label in crisp white - Semi-transparent background for readability - Perfectly positioned at 10x10 pixels (top-left) **Lightweight:** - Only uses essential Fabric API modules - Near-zero performance impact **Accurate measurement:** - Real frame-per-second calculation (not MC's smoothed F3 counter) ## Perfect For ✔️ Benchmarking modpacks ✔️ Streamers who show performance ✔️ Troubleshooting lag spikes ✔️ Competitive players optimizing setups ## Technical Info 🔹 Requires Fabric API 🔹 Client-side only 🔹 Configurable position (edit in code) --- > _"Because sometimes you need to see the numbers behind the magic"_
